body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"proposed fix description truncated mid-sentence at item 3: Three blockers prevent safe dispatch. First, PROPOSED FIX item 3 is truncated mid-sentence ('3. `ddx init --global` is\\n...[truncated]'); the full specification for init behaviour and any remaining items is unavailable. Second, sibling bead IDs for parts 1–3 are not listed as deps: the --global flag infrastructure may live in those beads, so a concurrent drain could attempt this before the flag exists. Third, AC3 ('ddx doctor's two new lines render correctly') does not state whether this bead implements the lines or merely asserts them; without the full proposed fix the ownership boundary is unresolvable. The named test functions are a genuine strength, but the truncation makes a semantics-preserving rewrite impossible — the operator must restore the missing text before this bead can be dispatched.","fingerprint":"3ce240369c0d1a827b08e9bb6513bcde7fa65e05bab3a907f4ccd291e775c8a3","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"3ce240369c0d1a827b08e9bb6513bcde7fa65e05bab3a907f4ccd291e775c8a3"}
